class.name: FestivalCensusImporter
class.brief_description: Imports Secret Census world packages into native festival resources.
class.description: Imports a [code]secret-census-world[/code] version 1 JSON package exported by the Secret Census app and turns every record into native resources ([FestivalNPCProfile], [FestivalLocation], [FestivalItem], [FestivalOutfit], [FestivalPlotHook], [FestivalEvent]) registered in [FestivalRegistry]. NPC secrets, rumors and passwords become [FestivalKnowledge] entries with stable derived ids, and dialogue entries become director-ready interaction dictionaries. Passing a save directory also writes each resource as an editable [code].tres[/code] file (for example [code]save_dir/npcs/<id>.tres[/code]). The full mapping is specified in [code]SECRET_CENSUS_COMPATIBILITY.md[/code] next to the module. Registered as the [code]FestivalCensusImporter[/code] singleton.

method.name: import_file
method.description: Reads the [code]*.census.json[/code] package at [param path] and imports it like [method import_text]. Returns a summary [Dictionary] with [code]ok[/code], per-group resource counts, [code]saved_files[/code] and the source [code]game[/code] info, or [code]ok = false[/code] and an [code]error[/code] message.

method.name: import_text
method.description: Imports a Secret Census package from a JSON string, registering everything in [FestivalRegistry] and generating [FestivalKnowledge] from NPC secrets, rumors and passwords. If [param save_dir] is not empty, every resource is also saved as a [code].tres[/code] file under it. Returns the same summary [Dictionary] as [method import_file].

method.name: password_knowledge_id
method.description: Returns the stable [FestivalKnowledge] id derived for a password string (lowercased, slugified, prefixed with [code]password.[/code]). The derivation is LOCKED because [FestivalNotebook] save files persist these ids across runs.
